title: Fast Food & Felonies: Ian Bick Gets Unlicensed
description_head: Ari sits down with Ian Bick to talk about his wild journey from jail to YouTube fame — using an illegal phone behind bars, sneaking in fast food, prison wrestling matches, and filming with MrBeast. Plus, the two give unlicensed advice to listeners who write in with their real-life problems.
